implementation_summary: Created AssistantButton component and integrated it into ChatInput. The button is positioned inside the input field on the right side (ChatGPT-style) with testID='assistant-button'. Functionality preserved - opens command panel when pressed.
acceptance_criteria_met: ✓ Chat screen loads → Input field renders → Assistant button is visible inside input container
✓ User types message → Text in input → Button does not obstruct or overlap text (positioned absolutely with proper padding)
✓ User taps assistant button → Button press → Assistant modal/menu opens as before (command panel toggle)
✓ Old button location → Previous location → Old inline button replaced with AssistantButton component
